## Input, formatting output, and expressions in Python scripts

### 2.1 Body Mass Index calculator [Spring, 2025-2026] 

```{#lst-ex-bmi .python filename="code/2026/ex_2_2.1.py" code-line-numbers="false" line-height=0.5}
{{< include ../code/2026/ex_2_2.1.py >}}
```

### 2.2 Text transformations [Spring, 2025-2026] 

```{.python filename="2026/ex_2_2.2.py" code-line-numbers="false"}
{{< include ../code/2026/ex_2_2.2.py >}}
```

### 2.3 Tsiolkovsky rocket equation [Spring, 2025-2026] 

```{.python filename="2026/ex_2_2.3.py" code-line-numbers="false"}
{{< include ../code/2026/ex_2_2.3.py >}}
```

### 2.4 Formatted table: unit conversion [Spring, 2025-2026] 

```{.python filename="2026/ex_2_2.4.py" code-line-numbers="false"}
{{< include ../code/2026/ex_2_2.4.py >}}
```

### 2.5 Glorifier [Spring, 2024-2025]

```{.python filename="code/2025/ex_2_glorifier.py" code-line-numbers="false"}
{{< include ../code/2025/ex_2_glorifier.py >}}
```

### 2.6 Repeat words [Spring, 2024-2025]

```{.python filename="code/2025/ex_2_repeat_words.py" code-line-numbers="false"}
{{< include ../code/2025/ex_2_repeat_words.py >}}
```

### 2.7 Braking distance [Spring, 2024-2025]

```{.python filename="code/2025/ex_2_braking_distance.py" code-line-numbers="false"}
{{< include ../code/2025/ex_2_braking_distance.py >}}
```

### 2.8 Velocity measurement by radar gun [Spring, 2024-2025]

```{.python filename="code/2025/ex_2_radar.py" code-line-numbers="false"}
{{< include ../code/2025/ex_2_radar.py >}}
```

### 2.9 Chevaux-Vapeur car tax calculator [Spring, 2024-2025]

```{.python filename="code/2025/ex_2_car_tax.py" code-line-numbers="false"}
{{< include ../code/2025/ex_2_car_tax.py >}}
```

### 2.10 Formatted table of numbers [Spring, 2024-2025]

```{.python filename="code/2025/ex_2_format_table.py" code-line-numbers="false"}
{{< include ../code/2025/ex_2_format_table.py >}}
```
